channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Albanese government plans to raise defence spending to 3% of GDP using NATO-style accounting
item.description: The Albanese government is set to announce a significant increase in Australia's defence spending, aiming for approximately 3% of GDP by 2033, according to the 2026 National Defence Strategy. Defence ...

item.title: WA Government fast-tracks renewable and green industrial projects under new development laws
item.description: The Cook government has announced the first five projects to gain priority status under Western Australia’s recently enacted State Development Act, marking a major step in its plan to accelerate renew...

item.title: Government Spokesperson Msigwa Urges Tanzanian Media to Uphold Peace and National Unity
item.description: The Permanent Secretary in the Ministry of Information, Culture, Arts and Sports, who also serves as the Government Chief Spokesperson, Gerson Msigwa, has appealed to media practitioners in Tanzania t...

item.title: Seven Convicted in Odisha for Supplying Fake SIM Cards and OTPs to Pakistani Intelligence
item.description: On Wednesday, a sessions court in Bhubaneswar convicted seven individuals, including five from Odisha, for procuring SIM cards using fake identities and sharing one-time passwords (OTPs) with Pakistan...

item.title: Bayern Munich host Real Madrid in Champions League quarter-final second leg
item.description: Real Madrid travel to Bayern Munich for the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final, needing to overturn a 2-1 deficit from the first leg. Bayern Munich claimed a narrow advantage at the Sa...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to Preparing for Microsoft Certifications AZ-303 and AZ-204
item.description: For anybody wey dey pursue IT career, Microsoft certifications don become serious validation for skills and fit help you stand out for job market. Certifications like Azure Solutions Architect (AZ-303...

item.title: CRDB Bank rewards customers with World Cup final tickets and prizes
item.description: CRDB Bank has announced four lucky winners who will travel to the United States to watch the 2026 FIFA World Cup final live as part of the ongoing campaign 'Fainali Ndo Mpango na TemboCard Visa.' The ...

item.title: A Review of Sopwell House: Hertfordshire’s Premier Spa Hotel
item.description: Sopwell House, located just outside St Albans in Hertfordshire, is widely regarded as one of the UK’s finest spa hotels. Its combination of historic charm and modern design makes it a favourite among ...

item.title: City of Ottawa sees increase in school zone speeding after photo radar cameras deactivated
item.description: Data from the City of Ottawa indicates that speeding in school zones has increased since photo radar cameras were temporarily turned off. These cameras, which are part of the city’s traffic safety mea...

item.title: President Zardari Orders Measures to Limit Power Outages Nationwide
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari on Wednesday instructed that all feasible steps be taken to reduce loadshedding across Pakistan. This decision was made during a high-level meeting on water resource managem...

item.title: Imo Police Arrest Five Suspects in Armed Robbery and Vehicle Snatching, Recover 450 Stolen Motorcycles and Over ₦6 Million
item.description: The Imo State Police Command has made a big breakthrough in the fight against crime by arresting five suspects linked to an armed robbery syndicate operating in the state. During a press briefing in O...

item.title: Australia to Increase Defence Spending by $53 Billion Over Next Decade
item.description: The Albanese government will inject an additional $53 billion into Australia’s defence budget over the next 10 years, aiming to counter concerns that the nation’s military is ill-prepared for modern w...

item.title: CBSE Class 10 2026 Second Board Exam Guidelines, Important Dates, and Fee Details Released
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has officially released the guidelines, important dates, and fee details for the Class 10 2026 second board examinations. These exams are meant for stud...

item.title: Walmart updates Great Value packaging to help consumers find key product information easily
item.description: Walmart is introducing a full redesign of its Great Value store brand packaging, marking the first major update in more than a decade. The initiative aims to make it easier for shoppers to quickly ide...

item.title: Organised illegal plant harvesting threatens Western Cape biodiversity
item.description: Since 2018, authorities in the Western Cape have seized over 2.5 million illegally harvested indigenous plants, exposing a growing environmental crime issue. Officials warn that these figures likely r...

item.title: Kenya gamblers battle betting firms in court over unpaid winnings and data rights
item.description: A number of Kenyan gamblers have taken betting companies to court after their winnings were not paid or their accounts were not handled as they wished, exposing tensions between the fast‑growing gambl...

item.title: Thomas Delaney’s Journey from Ketamine Addiction to Recovery
item.description: Thomas Delaney’s struggles with addiction began in his teenage years, shaped by a turbulent childhood marked by parental conflict and feelings of inadequacy. His first encounter with cocaine at 17 spa...

item.title: MPs push for government funding of schools in informal settlements to improve access to education
item.description: Wananchi wa makampuni kama Kibra, Mathare, na Mukuru wanaomba mamlaka ya maeneo ambayo kuna shule za kifunguwa ambazo kwa kiasi kikubwa haziwezi kipata kufadhilia rasmi kama shule za kiserikali. Wanas...

item.title: DOE Orders Oil and Gas Companies to Report Storage Capacities Nationwide to Ensure Fuel Supply Stability
item.description: The Department of Energy (DOE) has released an advisory directing all oil and gas companies operating terminals and depots across the Philippines to regularly submit detailed reports on their total an...

item.title: Meghan Markle's Jewelry Choices Spark Debate During Australia Visit
item.description: Meghan Markle’s recent visit to Australia with Prince Harry has drawn attention, not just to their engagements, but also to her fashion choices. During a solo visit to McAuley Community Services for W...
